summary: Pull up softwareengineeringproductivity.stanford.edu + Stanford AI Spend Index; review free papers and benchmark Sapling/G&B's stack against per-developer spend distribution
notes: From AI Friday: Measuring the Real ROI of AI in Software Engineering, 2026-05-08. Presenter flagged median AI spend per developer ~$400/mo, max $30K/mo, with high-lift companies clustering $500-$1K+. Free resources include the AI Spend Index and pre-publication papers.
